prompt: A grand neoclassical museum gallery interior. Polished marble floor with subtle veining stretches down a long hall. Tall grey marble columns with Corinthian capitals line both sides. Large oil paintings in ornate gold frames hang on the walls. White marble sculptures on pedestals — including a prominent Venus figure — stand along the centre aisle, protected by brass stanchion ropes. The gallery recedes through a series of arches toward a doorway with a classical pediment. An arched glass skylight ceiling floods the hall with warm diffused natural light. A dark wooden balustrade railing runs along one side. A few visitors stroll quietly in the distance. Behind the viewer, a wide marble staircase with ornate iron balusters descends to a lower-floor lobby, and a broad archway opens into an adjacent exhibition hall displaying medieval tapestries. To the left, a side alcove set into the wall houses a glass display case with small bronze figurines. To the right, beyond the nearest column, a wooden bench for visitors sits against the wall beneath a large landscape painting. First-person viewer. First-person eye-level view facing down the length of the museum gallery, with the balustrade railing visible at the lower-right edge of the frame.
